'''chawocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanoacetamide|cyanoacetamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanoacetamide|cyanoacetamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chawocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæwecheth|chæwecheth]] || [[word:chæwechej|chæwechej]] || [[word:chæwechesh|chæwechesh]] || [[word:chæweche|chæweche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawowochoth|chawowochoth]] || [[word:chawowochoj|chawowochoj]] || [[word:chawowochosh|chawowochosh]] || [[word:chawowocho|chawowocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawochoth|chawochoth]] || [[word:chawochoj|chawochoj]] || [[word:chawochosh|chawochosh]] || [[word:chawocho|chawocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawofchofth|chawofchofth]] || [[word:chawofchofj|chawofchofj]] || [[word:chawofchofsh|chawofchofsh]] || [[word:chawofchof|chawofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chawochotho|chawochotho]] || [[word:chawochojo|chawochojo]] || [[word:chawochosho|chawochosho]] || [[word:chawochoko|chawochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chawochoth|chawochoth]] || [[word:chawochoj|chawochoj]] || [[word:chawochosh|chawochosh]] || [[word:chawocho|chawocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chawochothol|chawochothol]] || [[word:chawochojol|chawochojol]] || [[word:chawochoshol|chawochoshol]] || [[word:chawochokol|chawochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chawochoothotho|chawochoothotho]] || [[word:chawochoojojo|chawochoojojo]] || [[word:chawochooshosho|chawochooshosho]] || [[word:chawochooko|chawochooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chawochothon|chawochothon]] || [[word:chawochojon|chawochojon]] || [[word:chawochoshon|chawochoshon]] || [[word:chawochokon|chawochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chawochothooro|chawochothooro]] || [[word:chawochojooro|chawochojooro]] || [[word:chawochoshooro|chawochoshooro]] || [[word:chawochokooro|chawochokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
